product_overview: Formah is a smart fitness app that helps users create, execute and analyze structured workouts with focus metrics and streak-based motivation. The app provides onboarding, authentication, workout creation, live workout tracking, history and performance insights.
core_goals: Enable users to create and execute structured workouts with minimal friction
Capture detailed set-level workout data (weight, reps) and rest timing during active sessions
Provide actionable performance insights and visualizations over weekly and monthly timeframes
Encourage consistency through a smart streak system that tracks adherence to weekly plans
Support simple account flows (signup, login, password reset) and profile management

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: 3-step introductory experience that explains app purpose and core flows and funnels users to the authentication screen.
user_flows: Open app -> See 3-step introduction explaining app purpose and features -> Complete introduction -> Navigate to /auth
Open app -> See 3-step introduction -> Attempt to proceed but a required remote resource fails to load -> See fallback content and retry option -> Complete introduction -> Navigate to /auth

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Account creation, login, and password reset so users can securely access their personal workout data.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email and password to login -> Submit credentials -> See /home
Navigate to /auth -> Fill invalid credentials to login -> Submit credentials -> See authentication error message -> Remain on /auth
Navigate to /auth -> Switch to signup and create account -> Provide email and password to register -> Submit registration -> See /home
Navigate to /auth -> Start reset password flow -> Provide account email -> Submit reset request -> See password reset confirmation and return to /auth
Navigate to /auth -> Start reset password flow -> Provide unknown email -> Submit reset request -> See error indicating no account found -> Remain on /auth

features.name: Workout Creation & Templates
features.description: Create reusable workout templates, define exercises and primary focus metrics to streamline starting workouts.
user_flows: Navigate to /create-template -> Define exercises and set primary focus metrics for each exercise -> Save template -> See template available for use
Navigate to /create-template -> Attempt to save template with no exercises defined -> See validation error indicating at least one exercise is required -> Remain on /create-template

Navigate to /create-template -> Create template with exercises -> Save template -> Navigate to /active -> Start workout from saved template -> Log sets (weight, reps) -> Finish workout -> See /summary

features.name: Active Workout (Live Tracking)
features.description: Run an active workout session where users log sets, manage rest timers, edit exercises on the fly, and finish sessions to produce summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /active -> Start a workout session (from template or new) -> Log sets (weight, reps) for each exercise -> Manage rest timer between sets -> Finish workout -> See /summary
Navigate to /active -> Start a workout session -> Attempt to log a set with invalid input (e.g., non-numeric weight) -> See validation error for the set -> Correct input and continue
Navigate to /active -> Start a workout session -> Edit exercise during session to adjust reps or remove exercise -> Continue logging sets -> Finish workout -> See /summary

features.name: Workout Summary
features.description: After finishing a workout users receive a session summary with set-level details and comparisons to recent performance.
user_flows: Finish a workout -> See /summary with completed sets, total volume and focus metric comparisons to previous sessions -> Dismiss summary
Finish a workout with incomplete or no logged sets -> See /summary showing an empty or partial session summary and guidance to log more data

features.name: History & Performance Analysis
features.description: Browse past workouts, view calendar history and charts to analyze weekly and monthly performance trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> See list of previous workouts and calendar view -> Select a workout to view detailed session data and graphs
Navigate to /history -> Select a time range with sufficient data -> See performance graphs and insights for the selected range
Navigate to /history -> Select a time range with insufficient data -> See message indicating more data is needed and suggestions to log workouts

features.name: Profile & Settings
features.description: Manage user profile information and app preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Update profile details or preferences -> Save changes -> See confirmation of saved settings
Navigate to /profile -> Attempt to save invalid profile data -> See validation error -> Remain on /profile

features.name: Smart Streak System
features.description: Track adherence to a user's weekly workout plan and encourage consistency without punishing optional misses.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> See current weekly plan and streak status -> Complete required workouts via /active -> Return to /home -> See updated streak reflected

Navigate to /home -> See suggestion to prioritize important workouts when streak is at risk -> Attempt to mark an optional workout complete without logging a session -> See guidance that only logged workouts count toward streaks

features.name: Focus Metric (Per-exercise primary metric)
features.description: Allow users to set a primary metric per exercise (e.g., weight or reps) and surface comparisons to previous sessions in real time and in summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /create-template -> Set primary focus metric for an exercise -> Save template -> Navigate to /active and run a session -> Log sets -> See focus metric comparisons in /summary
Navigate to /create-template -> Attempt to set an unsupported or malformed metric value -> See validation error -> Correct metric and save template

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login, signup, forgot password, reset password
user_interactions: Fill email and password to login
Switch to signup and create account
